info.name: B.E. API Collection
info.description: Complete SoulPause (Pocket Journal) API collection with 60+ endpoints. Includes: Journal CRUD (12), Insights (4), Media recommendations (15), Statistics (4), Streak (1), Interactions (1), User & Account Management (9), Jobs (8), Export (2), Authentication (3), System/Health (5). All endpoints are production-ready with timezone-aware datetime handling, optimized Firestore queries, dual-format preference support, and granular notification control.

item.name: 👤 User & Account
item.description: User profile, preferences, settings, and notifications (9 endpoints)

item.name: 📊 Statistics
item.description: Analytics and statistics (4 endpoints with timezone-aware datetime)

item.name: 📋 Jobs
item.description: Background job management (8+ endpoints including media-specific cache jobs)

item.name: 🏥 System
item.description: Health checks and system information (5 endpoints)
